title: State Department Cables 1985-2025 - Six Diplomatic Posts
summary: State Department cable traffic from six embassies/consulates (Papua New Guinea, Kazakhstan, Turkmenistan, Georgia, Mexico, Tajikistan) reporting UAP encounters across four decades.

audience.tldr: State Department diplomatic cable from an overseas diplomatic post documenting a UAP encounter (1985-2025) over Multiple overseas posts.
what_we_dont: Redacted portions may contain identifying or technical detail.
No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation (drone, balloon, atmospheric, sensor artifact) plausibly fits the description.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 42/100. Top drivers: witness credibility (civilian_credentialed), corroboration (multi_witness_no_instrument).
